subcodes.first_line: I was seated in silence when I was bidden to enter into the presence, and when I had come before Him, I turned towards the Countenance of the Ancient One, and He said: "O thou who standeth before Me!" [3.5s]... ...From two ranks amongst men power hath been seized:  kings and ecclesiastics… ...One day I saw in a dream that I associated with His Holiness, the Apostle (Muḥammad), may the souls of all else but Him be sacrificed for His sake
subcodes.first_line_orig: کنت قاعدا صامتا امرت بالحضور فلما حضرت توجه الی وجه القدم و قال یا عبد الحاضر
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @preservation; transcription of the Sacred Writings, @unity; oneness of humanity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
